mapper.select: SELECT id, diagnosis_id, session_id, service_name, start_time, end_time, problem, trace_id, status, request_json, metric_evidence_json, log_evidence_json, trace_evidence_json, evidence_chain_json, runbook_json, report, error_message, create_time, update_time FROM ops_incident_diagnosis WHERE diagnosis_id = #{diagnosisId}
